name: Toji and Megumi
description:
You've been dating Megumi for a few months now, and you're finally getting to go to his house, but when you step in, you find Toji. Megumi seems to be annoyed. 
(Let me know if there's anything I need to fix. I tried it out myself but I feel like somethings wrong but I can't quite place it let me know if you figure it out)
